external.description: A flag showing whether the file has an external URL

replaceVariables.description: A flag showing whether the file has variable content

FileView.description: A single file maintained by the MDM server

filePath.description: A path to a file relative to base directory for stored files, including the file name

uploadTime.description: A timestamp of file uploading (in milliseconds since epoch time), should be equal to the timestamp in the file system

checksum.description: An optional checksum of the file content

devicePath.description: A path to a file on device (including the file name)

external.description: A flag indicating whether the file is using the external URL instead of being uploaded.

externalUrl.description: An external URL referencing the content of the file

replaceVariables.description: A flag indicating whether the file content must be updated by device-specific values

UploadedFile.description: A specification of a single file uploaded to server by client

fileId.description: An ID of an uploaded file storing the content of the icon

fileName.description: The name of an uploaded file storing the content of the icon

Icon.description: A specification of a single icon used to represent an application on mobile device

email.description: An email address of a user

password.description: A password of a user (Salted SHA1 hash)

allDevicesAvailable.description: Are all devices available to user

allConfigAvailable.description: Are all configs available to user

twoFactorAccepted.description: Is two factor authentication accepted by the user

twoFactor.description: Is two factor authentication needed (a transient parameter, no db entry)

idleLogout.description: Timeout in seconds for logging out while idle (0 - no logout)

lastLoginFail.description: Last time for failed login (to avoid bruteforce attacks)

oldPassword.description: An old password for user to be used for verification when changing the password

newPassword.description: A new password to be set for user

User.description: A user account within MDM web application

permissions.description: A list of permissions granted to user role

UserRole.description: A role of user within MDM web application

UserRolePermission.description: A permission to perform desired action which might be granted to user role

PushRequest.description: Request to send Push messages to specified devices/groups

id.description: An ID of a settings record

roleId.description: An ID of a user role

columnDisplayedDeviceStatus.description: A flag indicating if Device Status column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedDeviceDate.description: A flag indicating if Device Update Date column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedDeviceNumber.description: A flag indicating if Device Nummber column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedDeviceModel.description: A flag indicating if Device Model column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedDevicePermissionsStatus.description: A flag indicating if Device Permissions column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedDeviceAppInstallStatus.description: A flag indicating if Device Apps column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedDeviceFilesStatus.description: A flag indicating if Device Files column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedDeviceConfiguration.description: A flag indicating if Device Configuration column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedDeviceImei.description: A flag indicating if Device IMEI column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedDevicePhone.description: A flag indicating if Device Phone column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedDeviceDesc.description: A flag indicating if Device Description column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedDeviceGroup.description: A flag indicating if Device Group column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedLauncherVersion.description: A flag indicating if Launcher Version column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedBatteryLevel.description: A flag indicating if Battery Level column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedDefaultLauncher.description: A flag indicating if the default launcher column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedMdmMode.description: A flag indicating if MDM mode column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedKioskMode.description: A flag indicating if kiosk mode column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedAndroidVersion.description: A flag indicating if Android version column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedEnrollmentDate.description: A flag indicating if enrollment date column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedSerial.description: A flag indicating if serial number column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedPublicIp.description: A flag indicating if public IP address column to be displayed in MDM web application

columnDisplayedCustom1.description: A flag indicating if custom property #1 column must be displayed in the Devices table

columnDisplayedCustom2.description: A flag indicating if custom property #2 column must be displayed in the Devices table

columnDisplayedCustom3.description: A flag indicating if custom property #3 column must be displayed in the Devices table

UserRoleSettings.description: The settings for single user role at customer level

PendingSignup.description: Record for the customer self-signup flow

ts.description: A timestamp of location recording by device (in milliseconds since epoch time)

backgroundColor.description: A background color to use when running MDM application

textColor.description: A text color to use when running MDM application

backgroundImageUrl.description: An URL for background image to use when running MDM application

iconSize.description: A size of the icons to use when running MDM application

disableLocation.description: A flag indicating if location permission shouldn't be granted

passwordMode.description: Password requirements for the mobile device

displayStatus.description: Set to true if Headind MDM should display device status (time, battery, etc)

runDefaultLauncher.description: Set to true if Headwind MDM need to work together with a third-party launcher

disableScreenshots.description: Flag indicating if screenshots are disabled on the device

autostartForeground.description: Flag indicating if autostarted apps should be kept in the foreground

timeZone.description: Time zone settings: null for using default settings, auto for automatic time zone, or Olson time zone string

newServerUrl.description: New server URL used to migrate to another server

kioskExit.description: Flag enabling the kiosk exit button

showWifi.description: Show WiFi settings if there's a connection error, also in Kiosk mode

password.description: A password for administrator of MDM application used on device

title.description: A displayed title of the MDM application used on device

applications.description: A list of applications to be used on device

gps.description: A flag indicating if GPS is enabled on device

bluetooth.description: A flag indicating if Bluetooth is enabled on device

wifi.description: A flag indicating if Wi-Fi is enabled on device

mobileData.description: A flag indicating if Mobile Data is enabled on device

usbStorage.description: A flag indicating if USB storage is enabled on device

kioskMode.description: A flag indicating if MDM is operating in kiosk mode

kioskHome.description: Flag enabling Home button in kiosk mode

kioskRecents.description: Flag enabling Recents button in kiosk mode

kioskNotifications.description: Flag enabling notifications in kiosk mode

kioskSystemInfo.description: Flag enabling system info in kiosk mode

kioskKeyguard.description: Flag enabling lock screen in kiosk mode

kioskLockButtons.description: Flag disabling power button in kiosk mode

lockStatusBar.description: A flag indicating if status bar is locked

kioskScreenOn.description: Flag forcing screen to be on in kiosk mode

mainApp.description: A package ID for the main application

systemUpdateFrom.description: A start time for system update period formatted as HH:MM. (If system update time is 2)

systemUpdateTo.description: A finish time for system update period formatted as HH:MM. (If system update time is 2)

scheduleAppUpdate.description: A flag indicating if the application update must be scheduled

appUpdateFrom.description: A start time for app update period formatted as HH:MM.

appUpdateTo.description: A finish time for app update period formatted as HH:MM.

applicationSettings.description: A list of application settings to apply on device

files.description: A list of files to apply on device

newNumber.description: New device number, used for changing the device number

restrictions.description: List of additional restrictions in MDM mode

custom1.description: Custom property #1 if it is being sent to device

custom2.description: Custom property #2 if it is being sent to device

custom3.description: Custom property #3 if it is being sent to device

SyncResponse.description: The details and settings for a single device used for configuring MDM mobile application

DeviceCreateOptions.description: Options applied when a device must be created on demand

type.description: A type of the application setting. 1 - String, 2 - Integer, 3 - Boolean

readonly.description: A flag indicating if setting can not be modified on device

lastUpdate.description: A timestamp of the last update of the setting (in milliseconds since epoch time

variable.description: A flag indicating if setting has variable content

SyncApplicationSetting.description: A single setting for an application installed and used on mobile device and used in data sycnhronization between mobile device and server application

JWTToken.description: A JWT token identifying a single client of the application

login.description: A username to be used for authentication

password.description: A password to be used for authentication (MD5-hash)

UserCredentials.description: The credentials to be used for authenticating the user to application
